name: Sourdough Whole Wheat Pancakes
recipeIngredient: 1/2 teaspoon baking soda, dissolve in 1 tbsp water
recipeInstructions: Mix all ingredients except dissolved baking soda with the sourdough starter. Heat a griddle or skillet to 375°F. Just before cooking, fold the dissolved baking soda into the batter. If the batter seems thick, dilute it with lukewarm water. Cook as for ordinary pancakes, making them about 3 to 4 inches in diameter. Makes about 12 small pancakes.
